chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI M.A. No. 119 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1.For order on MA No.299/25 2.For order on MA No.7707/23 3.For order on MA No.7706/23 4.For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 Mr. Sikandar Khan, advocate for appellant ---------- Counsel for appellant does not wish to press this appeal. Accordingly, this M.A. is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending applications subject to all legal implications. J U D G E Ashraf
